summary: Comprehensive testing of Earna Flow app completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working including login, register, contacts, signals, and AI analysis. Fixed 1 data integrity bug in seed endpoint.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' - React Native deprecation warning, non-blocking
Console warning: 'useNativeDriver not supported' - Expected in web preview, works fine in native apps

action_items: Consider updating @react-native-async-storage/async-storage to version 2.2.0 for better compatibility (currently 3.0.2, but not causing issues)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (Fixed Emma Rodriguez auto_signals_count from 2 to 0 in seed data)
seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint creates 3 demo contacts (Sarah Mitchell with 3 signals, James Chen with 2 signals, Emma Rodriguez with 0 signals) for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend API is solid with 100% test pass rate. Frontend UI matches Figma design. AI analysis using GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key is working perfectly, generating relevant opportunities (e.g., 'Mortgage Pre-Approval & Buyer Finance Partner' with 93% match for real estate agent). No critical issues found.
rca_of_issue: Bug Fixed: Seed data endpoint had hardcoded auto_signals_count values that didn't match actual signals created. Emma Rodriguez was set to auto_signals_count: 2 but no signals were created for her. Root cause: Hardcoded values instead of calculating from actual signal creation. Fix: Changed Emma's auto_signals_count to 0 to match reality (no signals created for her in seed data).
